commentary_text: The model favors Uzbekistan at 47%, while the sportsbook consensus favors DR Congo at 41%, a 18-percentage-point gap on the DR Congo win. The draw sits nearly level across both sources. Real-money markets may be pricing in recent form, injury status, or lineup changes that the model's last update did not capture, or conversely the model's Elo-based baseline may reflect stronger underlying strength that recent noise has obscured. The dashboard flags this as a meaningful signal rather than evidence that either source has misjudged the matchup.
